intro.location: Based in Chandigarh, India — open to relocate
intro.name: Saurav Sirsat
intro.title: Software Developer & Backend Engineer
intro.description: I specialize in building scalable backend services using Java 8+, Spring Boot, and Microservices architecture. With a strong focus on distributed systems, data engineering, and cloud-native solutions, I craft robust and high-performing applications that drive business value.

about.heading: About Me
about.paragraph1: I am Saurav Sirsat, a Software Developer with a passion for building efficient and scalable backend systems. Currently pursuing my B.Tech in Computer Science at Chandigarh University, I have focused my expertise on Java, Spring Boot, and Microservices.
about.paragraph2: My experience includes developing multi-tenant SaaS platforms, optimizing database performance, and implementing complex data pipelines using PySpark and Apache Spark. I enjoy solving architectural challenges and ensuring that backend services are both reliable and performant.
about.paragraph3: I have a proven track record of delivering end-to-end features, from REST API design to database schema optimization. My approach combines technical rigor with a focus on clean code and documentation, ensuring long-term maintainability.
about.paragraph4: Beyond coding, I am a certified classical singer and I have a keen interest in financial valuation and cashflow analysis. I am always eager to learn new technologies and contribute to innovative projects that make a difference.

experience.heading: My Experience
experience.content: Professional internships and experience in software development.

abhyaz.title: Software Developer Intern
abhyaz.description: Developed and maintained scalable backend services using Java 8+ and Spring Boot for data-driven business workflows. Implemented REST APIs handling structured and semi-structured datasets with validation and error handling. Performed complex SQL transformations and query tuning to support reporting, auditing, and analytics. Introduced Redis-based caching for frequently accessed data, improving system responsiveness under load. Led incident triage and root cause analysis for production issues, reducing average resolution time by 35%.

internpixel.title: Software Developer Intern
internpixel.description: Collaborated with product managers, designers, and engineers to translate business requirements into technical features. Debugged and resolved 15+ frontend and backend issues through structured root cause analysis. Improved platform stability and delivery timelines by proactively identifying bottlenecks. Contributed to documentation and release notes to support smoother cross-team handoffs.

projects.heading: My Projects
projects.content: A selection of projects I've worked on, showcasing my skills in backend and full-stack development.

posSaaS.title: Multi-Tenant POS SaaS Platform
posSaaS.description: Architected a multi-tenant microservices-based platform with strict schema-level data isolation. Developed 60+ RESTful APIs using Spring Boot and Hibernate for transactional and analytical workflows. Optimized SQL queries and database schemas, improving query execution time by 30%. Implemented Redis caching to reduce database load and achieve low-latency responses. Added structured logging and monitoring to improve observability, reliability, and incident diagnosis.

financialInsights.title: AI-Powered Financial Insights SaaS
financialInsights.description: Built backend services to ingest, validate, transform, and analyze financial datasets for scoring and insights. Designed data pipelines with auditability and traceability to support financial analysis use cases. Exposed REST APIs for internal and external consumers to enable automated data delivery. Containerized services using Docker to ensure consistent deployments across environments. Implemented monitoring and health checks to maintain platform stability and SLA compliance.

testimonials.heading: Testimonials
testimonials.content: What my colleagues and mentors say about my work.

mentor1.name: Project Mentor
mentor1.content: Saurav's ability to handle complex SQL transformations and his proactive approach to incident triage significantly improved our system's reliability. He is a dedicated developer with a strong grasp of Spring Boot.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subheading: Get answers to common questions about my skills and experience.

services.question: What technologies do you specialize in?
services.answer: I specialize in Java, Spring Boot, Microservices architecture, and SQL. I also have experience with Redis for caching, Docker for containerization, and Spark for data engineering.

experience.question: What kind of projects have you worked on?
experience.answer: I have worked on complex systems like a Multi-Tenant POS SaaS platform and an AI-Powered Financial Insights SaaS, focusing on building scalable and reliable backend services.

rate.question: What is your typical role in a team?
rate.answer: I usually work as a Backend Developer or Software Developer, focusing on API design, database optimization, and implementing business logic in a microservices environment.

remote.question: Are you available for remote work?
remote.answer: Yes, I am comfortable working in remote environments and have experience collaborating with distributed teams.

technologies.question: Do you have experience with cloud technologies?
technologies.answer: Yes, I use Docker for containerization and I'm familiar with deploying services in cloud-native environments. I also work with Redis for distributed caching.

existing.question: Can you handle legacy codebases?
existing.answer: Absolutely. I have experience debugging and optimizing existing backend services and refactoring legacy code to follow better design patterns.
